allow: Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pip install --upgrade pip setuptools wheel)
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "from config.settings import settings; print\('settings OK:', type\(settings\).__name__\)")

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import torch; print\('torch:', torch.__version__\); print\('CUDA available:', torch.cuda.is_available\(\)\); print\('GPU:', torch.cuda.get_device_name\(0\) if torch.cuda.is_available\(\) else 'N/A'\)")

Bash(touch server/__init__.py server/app.py server/websocket_manager.py server/routes/__init__.py server/routes/predictions.py server/routes/health.py engines/prices/__init__.py engines/prices/price_stream.py engines/prices/price_aggregator.py engines/forecasting/timesfm_model.py)
